name: hassan-agentic-ai
description: Web Developer | Hassan Biswas — UI/UX & Front-End Architecture.

scripts.version:auto: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); const d = new Date(); pkg.version = `${d.getFullYear()}.${d.getMonth() + 1}.${d.getDate()}`; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2));"
